name: selenium-js-toolshop-qa
description: Projeto profissional de automacao web com Selenium WebDriver, JavaScript, Mocha, Chai e Mochawesome.

scripts.test:report: npm run report:clean && cross-env HEADLESS=true mocha --reporter mochawesome --reporter-options reportDir=mochawesome-report,reportFilename=index,html=true,json=true,overwrite=true

author: Douglas Antoni
